timeline.title: One last job...
timeline.description: Timeline of the major events in the party's history.

events.title: The Kindred Bound is formed
events.description: Rowena, Marlaina, Daniel and James form the original Kindred Bound party and set out to adventure

events.title: The Wispering Woods
events.description:
The Kindred Bound clears the Whispering Woods.
A newborn is named after Rowena.

events.title: Andura joins
events.description: Andura joins the group and helps them clearing the Whispering Woods
